purpose: Visual registry for the Battle Tower recognition gate. This registry does not own scoring or question generation.

battle_tower.title: Recognition Gate
battle_tower.purpose: The Tower checks whether the player can recognize the selected state through stage, type, pillar, and OHU signals.
battle_tower.rule: Advance by recognition. The selected character/form remains visible while the questions test the state from different angles.

tower_gate.title: Tower Gate
tower_gate.purpose: A visual threshold between town observation and formal recognition practice.
tower_gate.rule: The gate does not change the selected state; it frames the same state as a challenge.

floor2_type.label: Type Gate
floor2_type.signal: DISC family language becomes visible next.

floor3_pillar.label: Pillar Gate
floor3_pillar.signal: The state is read through the Z9 pillar lens.

floor4_ohu.label: OHU Gate
floor4_ohu.signal: Overdeveloped, Healthy, and Underdeveloped expressions are separated.
